subcodes.first_line: O My Beloved! I have recognized what hath befallen thee and what fate hath been decreed for thy countenance, and I have hearkened unto the secret melodies of thine inmost heart and the lamentations of thy spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حبیب قد عرفت ما جری علیک و قضی علی وجهک و سمعت لحنات سرک و جزعات روحک
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
